jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Zepto
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto family as a SEO Specialist in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto:
Zepto is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto!
